decision_points.description: Inspect the blue-white screening plate at least once to learn the colony identifiers and screening parameters before running colony PCR.

citations.title: The pUC plasmids, an M13mp7-derived system for insertion mutagenesis and sequencing with synthetic universal primers
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed canonical pUC blue-white screening paper used to justify the plate-inspection step.

decision_points.description: Never submit blue colonies to colony PCR: blue colonies are vector-only background for this task.

citations.title: The pUC plasmids, an M13mp7-derived system for insertion mutagenesis and sequencing with synthetic universal primers
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed canonical pUC blue-white screening paper establishing that blue colonies carry empty vector and should not be picked as putative recombinants.

decision_points.description: Continue screening white colonies until the cumulative probability of having found at least one recombinant is at least 95%.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference for the binomial cumulative distribution used to derive the 95% screening-confidence stopping rule from the 0.4 white-colony hit rate.

decision_points.description: Screen at least the NIST-derived minimum of six white colonies required to reach 95% confidence at a 0.4 per-colony hit rate.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference supporting the six-colony derived threshold from the binomial model with p=0.4 and confidence=0.95.

screened_blue_background.canonical_diagnosis: Blue colonies were submitted to colony PCR even though they represent vector-only background in this screen.
acceptable_variants: Blue colonies should not have been screened because they are empty-vector background.
Screening blue colonies wastes reagents because blue colonies retain lacZ alpha and do not contain the insert.

citations.title: The pUC plasmids, an M13mp7-derived system for insertion mutagenesis and sequencing with synthetic universal primers
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed canonical pUC blue-white screening paper establishing blue colonies as vector-only background.

undersampled_white_colonies.canonical_diagnosis: Screening stopped before reaching the 95% cumulative confidence threshold for finding a recombinant.
acceptable_variants: Fewer white colonies were screened than the NIST binomial threshold required, so the confidence target was not reached.
The screening stopped below the 95% cumulative confidence target for this hit rate.

citations.title: NIST/SEMATECH e-Handbook of Statistical Methods: Binomial Distribution
citations.tier_justification: Official NIST reference supporting the cumulative binomial confidence threshold used to judge undersampling.
